name: Study
description: A small private office (despacho) for reading, writing and storing papers. Smaller than a library and dominated by a single desk pushed against a wall, with bookshelves at the writer's back, a chair facing the desk, a chest for documents and at least one generous window so the writer gets daylight on their work.

required_furniture.rule: 2 blocks long of @primary, set against a wall, facing a window.
Sits on top of the desk; substitute minecraft:lantern when ceiling height < 4.
Facing the desk; placed on the carpet strip in front of it.
On the same wall as the desk, adjacent to it (so they read as one fitted workspace behind the chair line of sight).
On the floor next to the chair/desk for storing papers and books.
Single rug under the desk and chair, never under furniture blocks.
At least one wide (2-block) window on the wall the desk faces, for natural light.

placement_rules: Chest within arm's reach of the chair
Reserve the top course of the window wall as a @primary lintel
lighting_ventilation: Daylight from a large @glass window on the desk-facing wall; supplemental light from a minecraft:lectern or minecraft:lantern on the desk. Single occupancy room so a single window suffices for ventilation.

medieval.notes: Oak planks shell, red carpet, a single lectern with a candle — scriptorium feel.

modern.notes: Quartz/andesite shell, grey carpet, white-glass full-height window; lantern instead of lectern for a desk lamp.

fantasy.notes: Dark oak shell with purple carpet and purple-stained window; lectern reads as a spellbook stand.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.study.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
